title: Tempting Crispy Venezuelan Pistachio Empanadas
description: A smoky and crispy Venezuelan dish featuring pistachio paste, perfect as a hangover cure, made lacto-vegetarian-friendly and air-fried to perfection. This recipe combines the richness of pistachio with the crunch of empanada pastry.
instructions: Preheat the air fryer to 375 degrees Fahrenheit.
Roll out the empanada pastry to a thickness of about 1/8 inch.
Cut out circles of pastry using a cookie cutter or the rim of a glass.
Place a tablespoon of pistachio paste in the center of each pastry circle.
Sprinkle shredded mozzarella cheese over the pistachio paste.
Fold the pastry in half over the filling and press the edges together to seal.
Brush the tops of the empanadas with beaten egg for a golden glaze.
Sprinkle smoked paprika and salt over the empanadas.
Drizzle olive oil over the empanadas.
Air-fry the empanadas for 5-7 minutes or until crispy and golden brown.
Serve the empanadas hot and enjoy.
